title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis suggests humanity may be in the foothills of the singularity. AI agents are now performing practical tasks like coding, research, and science, raising the question of whether imperfect but useful AI has already accelerated real workflows.
